type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Large engines ran at >90% loading in 2021; switched AP-42 factors for NOx to 4-stroke lean-burn running 90-105%, which are higher than the factor for <90% loading (applicable 2020)

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Large engines ran at >90% loading in 2021; switched AP-42 factors for CO to 4-stroke lean-burn running 90-105% instead of <90% loading (applicable 2020)

Inventory adjustment showed some smaller field engines changed from 2-stroke lean --> 4-stroke rich
